overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character exploring an abandoned urban street in Night City. The character walks past the derelict Grand Imperial Mall and observes a massive construction site before approaching the mall entrance. The scene features bright morning sunlight, futuristic architecture, and abandoned vehicles scattered throughout.

scene_state.functional_zone: abandoned commercial street with derelict mall

agents.ego_description: walking steadily down the deserted street toward an intersection, passing abandoned vehicles and concrete barricades

entered.detail: large commercial building with teal accents and large signage reading 'GRAND IMPERIAL MALL'
derelict white sport utility vehicle parked in the middle of the road
tall palm trees lining the street in the distance
orange and white striped concrete barriers blocking off sections of the road

segments.scene_description: The segment shows a first-person view walking down an abandoned city street in a futuristic setting. The Grand Imperial Mall dominates the left side with its distinctive architecture and signage. Abandoned vehicles and concrete barricades litter the asphalt road. Palm trees and distant skyscrapers are visible ahead under a clear morning sky. The street is completely empty of people and active traffic.

scene_state.functional_zone: massive construction site with megabuildings and cranes

events.description: camera turns right revealing the massive construction site with towering megabuildings and construction cranes

agents.ego_description: stops walking and turns to observe the massive construction site with towering incomplete buildings and suspended cranes

entered.detail: massive incomplete skyscraper complex with exposed framework and construction equipment
large construction cranes mounted on top of the unfinished buildings
colorful gas station canopy with red, yellow, and blue stripes
blue holographic advertisement display floating near the construction site

segments.scene_description: The camera turns right to reveal a breathtaking view of a massive construction site dominated by towering megabuildings under construction. Multiple construction cranes are visible against the bright sky. A colorful gas station canopy sits in the mid-ground. The scale of the architecture emphasizes the dystopian, cyberpunk setting. The scene remains static for a moment as the character observes the impressive structures.

scene_state.functional_zone: derelict mall entrance with graffiti-covered walls

events.description: camera turns left and begins walking toward the Grand Imperial Mall entrance

agents.ego_description: turns left and walks along the concrete sidewalk toward the mall entrance, passing abandoned vehicles and graffiti-covered walls

entered.detail: large commercial building with teal accents reappearing as the camera turns left
large entrance doorway to the Grand Imperial Mall with teal architectural accents
beige walls covered in colorful graffiti and street art including red and blue tags
derelict blue sedan with open doors parked near the mall entrance

segments.scene_description: The camera turns left and walks toward the Grand Imperial Mall entrance along a concrete sidewalk. The mall's facade is now close and detailed, showing extensive graffiti and weathering. An abandoned blue car sits near the entrance. The camera approaches the large doorway, revealing the derelict state of the building with its colorful street art and architectural details. The scene ends as the character nears the mall entrance.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey down a desolate futuristic street that shifts from a wide urban vista to the intimate, weathered entrance of a derelict mall. It begins by moving past the imposing architecture of the Grand Imperial Mall, navigating an asphalt road littered with abandoned vehicles and concrete barricades under a clear morning sky. As the camera turns right, the view expands to reveal a massive construction site dominated by towering megabuildings and cranes that loom over a colorful gas station canopy. The perspective then shifts back to the left, gliding along a concrete sidewalk toward the mall's facade where the scale narrows to reveal detailed graffiti and a rusted blue car. Finally, the camera closes in on the large doorway, ending the sequence as it reaches the colorful street art of the building's entrance.
